headline: Spotting Winners: Church & Dwight (NYSE:CHD) And Household Products Stocks In Q1
summary: Quarterly earnings results are a good time to check in on a company’s progress, especially compared to its peers in the same sector. Today we are looking at Church & Dwight (NYSE:CHD) and the best and worst performers in the household products industry.
